characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long wavy brown hair. She has a small mole on her left cheek.
characters.wardrobe: Black cardigan worn over a white collared shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच बताऊँ तो, English की वजह से [To be honest, because of English,]
Character A says: मेरी life पूरी तरह बदल गई। [my life changed completely.]
Character A says: Number 1. MNC में job interview clear किया। [Number 1. Cleared a job interview in an MNC.]
Character A says: Number 2. Client meeting में confidence से बात की। [Number 2. Spoke with confidence in a client meeting.]
Character A says: Number 3. Office में promotion! [Number 3. Promotion in the office!]
Character A says: इन सब के लिए [For all of this,]
Character A says: fluent English बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है, right? [speaking fluent English is very important, right?]
Character A says: पीछे मुड़कर देखती हूँ तो सोचती हूँ, [When I look back, I think,]
Character A says: अगर मुझे English नहीं आती? [what if I didn't know English?]
Character A says: तो शायद ये मौके कभी नहीं मिलते। [Then maybe I would never have gotten these opportunities.]
Character A says: और इसीलिए मैं आज भी [And that's why even today I]
Character A says: रोज़ाना practice करती हूँ [practice daily]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by sharing relatable career milestones achieved through English fluency.
- Establishes the core problem: lack of English holds you back from opportunities.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone that resonates with working professionals.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
[Supernova app link & practice tips] ([Supernova app link & practice tips])
[Life turning point] मेरी life पूरी तरह बदल गई ([Life turning point] My life changed completely)
1번. MNC में job interview clear किया (Number 1. Cleared a job interview in an MNC)
2번. Client meeting में confidence से बात की (Number 2. Spoke with confidence in a client meeting)
3번. Office में promotion! (Number 3. Promotion in the office!)
इन सब के लिए fluent English बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है, right? (Speaking fluent English is very important for all of this, right?)
पीछे मुड़कर देखती हूँ तो सोचती हूँ, अगर मुझे English नहीं आती? तो शायद ये मौके कभी नहीं मिलते (Looking back, if I couldn't speak English? Wouldn't have grabbed the opportunities)
[English study method revealed] और इसीलिए मैं आज भी रोज़ाना practice करती हूँ ([English study method revealed] And that's why even today I practice daily)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova app के daily lessons के साथ। [with Supernova app's daily lessons.]
Character A says: इनका जो AI Tutor feature है ना, [Their AI Tutor feature, you know,]
Character A says: वो सच में बहुत कमाल का है। [it is really amazing.]
Character A says: Practice tab में जाकर [Going to the practice tab,]
Character A says: आप कोई भी situation select कर सकते हो, [you can select any situation,]
Character A says: जैसे job interview या customer से बात करना, [like a job interview or talking to a customer,]
Character A says: और अपनी खुद की practice शुरू कर सकते हो। [and start your own practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution to the problem.
- Highlights the AI Tutor feature.
- Emphasizes practical, real-world scenarios (interviews, customers) relevant to the Indian working demographic.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova app के daily lessons.. (Supernova app's daily lessons..)
(मैं रोज़ ऐसे practice करती हूँ) ((I practice like this daily))
इनका AI Tutor feature! सच में बहुत कमाल का है (Their AI Tutor feature! It's really amazing)
Practice tab में कोई भी situation select करें (Select any situation in the practice tab)
जैसे job interview या customer से बात करना, और अपनी practice शुरू करें (Like a job interview or talking to a customer, and start your practice)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: जो लोग English बोलने में हिचकिचाते हैं, उनके लिए ये best है। [For those who hesitate to speak English, this is the best.]
Character A says: क्योंकि शुरुआत में [Because in the beginning,]
Character A says: office में या दोस्तों के सामने English बोलने में डर लगता है ना? [it feels scary to speak English in the office or in front of friends, right?]
Character A says: इस feature में [In this feature,]
Character A says: बात करते हुए जब भी आप अटको, [whenever you get stuck while talking,]
Character A says: आपको instant hints और real-time feedback मिलता है, [you get instant hints and real-time feedback,]
Character A says: तो ऐसा लगता है जैसे किसी दोस्त से बात कर रहे हो। [so it feels like you are talking to a friend.]
Character A says: बिल्कुल असली इंसान जैसी आवाज़ के साथ [With a voice exactly like a real person,]
Unknown speaker says: Is it dry? [Is it dry?]
Character A says: आप अपनी speed से natural बातचीत कर सकते हो, [you can have a natural conversation at your own speed,]
Character A says: तो असली दुनिया में बोलने से पहले [so before speaking in the real world,]
Character A says: मैं सबको यहाँ practice करने की सलाह देती हूँ। [I advise everyone to practice here.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the emotional barrier of hesitation and fear of judgment.
- Showcases app features (instant hints, real-time feedback) as a safe space to practice.
- Demonstrates the natural AI voice to build trust in the technology.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
हिचकिचाने वालों के लिए best! (Best for those who hesitate!)
शुरुआत में office में या दोस्तों के सामने English बोलने में डर लगता है ना? (Scared to speak English in the office or in front of friends in the beginning, right?)
इस feature में आपको मिलेगा: 1. Instant hints 2. Real-time feedback (In this feature you will get: 1. Instant hints 2. Real-time feedback)
ऐसा लगता है जैसे किसी दोस्त से बात कर रहे हो (Feels like you are talking to a friend)
+ बिल्कुल असली इंसान जैसी आवाज़! (+ Voice exactly like a real person!)
(AI Tutor voice) ((AI Tutor voice))
अपनी speed से natural बातचीत करें (Have a natural conversation at your own speed)
असली दुनिया में बोलने से पहले यहाँ practice ज़रूर करें! (Definitely practice here before speaking in the real world!)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं अपने दोस्तों से हमेशा कहती हूँ [I always tell my friends,]
Character A says: कि please, एकदम perfect English बोलने की ज़िद छोड़ दो! [that please, drop the insistence on speaking perfectly perfect English!]
Character A says: बोलते वक़्त grammar की गलतियों से डर लगता है ना? [You feel scared of grammar mistakes while speaking, right?]
Character A says: लेकिन Supernova का तरीका एकदम simple है: [But Supernova's approach is very simple:]
Character A says: गलतियाँ करो, तभी तो सीखोगे! [Make mistakes, only then you will learn!]
Character A says: English अच्छी करनी है तो गलतियाँ करनी पड़ेंगी। [If you want to improve English, you have to make mistakes.]
Character A says: इनका ये practical तरीका मुझे इतना पसंद है कि [I like their practical approach so much that]
Character A says: अब Supernova के बिना practice करने का मैं सोच भी नहीं सकती। [now I can't even think of practicing without Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks down the perfectionism barrier that holds Indian learners back.
- Introduces Supernova's core philosophy: learning through making mistakes.
- Reinforces brand loyalty without using aggressive hype or ranking claims.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
दोस्तों से हमेशा कहती हूँ: please, एकदम perfect English बोलने की ज़िद छोड़ दो!!! (Always tell friends: please, drop the insistence on speaking perfectly perfect English!!!)
English बोलने में डर क्यों लगता है? "Grammar की गलतियों की वजह से" (Why is it scary to speak English? "Because of grammar mistakes")
लेकिन Supernova का तरीका एकदम simple है (But Supernova's approach is very simple)
गलतियाँ करो, तभी तो सीखोगे! (Make mistakes, only then you will learn!)
English अच्छी करनी है? गलतियाँ करनी पड़ेंगी। (Want to improve English? You have to make mistakes.)
Supernova का practical तरीका (Supernova's practical approach)
अब Supernova के बिना practice? मैं सोच भी नहीं सकती.. (Practice without Supernova now? I can't even imagine..)

scenes.scene_label: Study Group and Call to Action
scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं भी अभी job कर रही हूँ और [I am also working right now and]
Character A says: मुझे अपनी English लगातार improve करनी होती है। [I need to continuously improve my English.]
Character A says: अगर आप भी अपनी English बेहतर करना चाहते हैं, [If you also want to make your English better,]
Character A says: तो आज ही अपनी practice शुरू करें। [then start your practice today.]
Character A says: Supernova app download करने का link [The link to download the Supernova app]
Character A says: और इनके affordable subscription plans की details [and details of their affordable subscription plans]
Character A says: मैंने अपने profile के bio में डाल दी हैं। [I have put in my profile's bio.]
Character A says: अगर आपको direct link चाहिए, [If you want a direct link,]
Character A says: तो comments में 'Supernova' लिख दो [then write 'Supernova' in the comments]
Character A says: और मैं आपको DM में link भेज दूँगी। [and I will send you the link in DM.]
Character A says: चलिए, इस साल English बोलने का डर खत्म करते हैं। [Come on, let's end the fear of speaking English this year.]
Character A says: All the best! [All the best!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Relates back to the working professional persona.
- Delivers a clear Call to Action (CTA) for app download and subscription.
- Drives engagement by asking viewers to comment the brand name for a direct link.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैं भी job कर रही हूँ और मुझे अपनी English लगातार improve करनी होती है (I am also working and I need to continuously improve my English)
आज ही अपनी practice शुरू करें! (Start your practice today!)
1. Supernova app download link (1. Supernova app download link)
2. Affordable subscription details (2. Affordable subscription details)
Links मैंने अपने profile के bio में डाल दिए हैं :) (I have put the links in my profile's bio :))
or अगर आपको direct link चाहिए? (or if you want a direct link?)
Comments में 'Supernova' लिख दें, मैं DM में link भेज दूँगी! (Write 'Supernova' in the comments, I'll send the link in DM!)
इस साल English बोलने का डर खत्म करते हैं! All the best! (Let's end the fear of speaking English this year! All the best!)
